title: The Magic Mirror
description: This mirror reflects players and has various magical uses
body:
This mod introduces a mirror that reflects the player closest to it.

![Screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/TBoshoven/MinecraftMods/img/magic-mirror/screenshot.png "Screenshot")

It is also magic.

### **Modifiers**
(attach by right clicking)

![Armor stand](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/TBoshoven/MinecraftMods/img/magic-mirror/demo-armorstand.gif "Armor stand")

**Armor stand** (1.12+): Swap armor with it (fancy magic armor stand!)

![Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/TBoshoven/MinecraftMods/img/magic-mirror/demo-banner.gif "Banner")

**Banner** (1.14+): Change the background to a banner pattern, to make your mirror fit in with the rest of your base

![Skeleton](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/TBoshoven/MinecraftMods/img/magic-mirror/demo-skeleton.gif "Skeleton")

**Skeleton skull** (1.12+): Turn your reflection into a skeleton

More to come...

### **Recipe**

![Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/TBoshoven/MinecraftMods/img/magic-mirror/recipe.png "Recipe")

This mod was designed to impact performance as little as possible.

### **Versions**

The 1.14.x, 1.15.x, 1.16.x, 1.17.x, 1.18.x, 1.19.x, and 1.20.x versions are actively maintained and will receive bug fixes as needed.
New features will be implemented on the highest version and will often be backported to earlier versions.

The 1.12.2 version is stable. It may occasionally get bug fixes, but will most likely not get any new features.
